ddls:
CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Code for the airport */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the airport */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the airport */,
  "airport_type" TEXT /* Type of airport (e.g., international, domestic, regional) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum passenger capacity of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airport_clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport cluster */,
  "cluster_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport cluster */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the airport cluster */,
  "cluster_type" TEXT /* Type of cluster (e.g., regional, national, international) */,
  "cluster_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the cluster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regional_apt_groups" (
  "rpt_apt_grp_cd" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regional airport group */,
  "rpt_apt_grp_name" TEXT /* Name of the regional airport group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the regional airport group */,
  "group_type" TEXT /* Type of group (e.g., regional, national, international) */,
  "group_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rpt_apt_grp_cd")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_traffic_data" (
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger traffic data entry */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport */,
  "rundate" TEXT /* Date the data was recorded */,
  "this_period" INTEGER /* Passenger traffic for the current period */,
  "last_period" INTEGER /* Passenger traffic for the previous period */,
  "total_pax_shd_tp" INTEGER /* Total passengers (sheduled) for the current period */,
  "total_pax_cht_tp" INTEGER /* Total passengers (charter) for the current period */,
  "total_pax_tp" INTEGER /* Total passengers for the current period */,
  "total_pax_lp" INTEGER /* Total passengers for the last period */,
  "total_pax_pc" REAL /* Percentage change in total passengers */,
  "traffic_type" TEXT /* Type of traffic (e.g., domestic, international, transit) */,
  "passenger_type" TEXT /* Type of passenger (e.g., adult, child, infant) */,
  "traffic_volume" INTEGER /* Total number of passengers */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_traffic_data_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airlines" (
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airline */,
  "airline_name" TEXT /* Name of the airline */,
  "airline_code" TEXT /* Code for the airline */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airline is based */,
  "airline_type" TEXT /* Type of airline (e.g., low-cost, full-service, cargo) */,
  "hub_airport" INTEGER /* Primary hub airport of the airline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airline operating the route */,
  "origin_airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the origin airport */,
  "destination_airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination airport */,
  "route_type" TEXT /* Type of route (domestic or international) */,
  "route_distance" REAL /* Distance of the route */,
  "flight_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of flights on the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_origin_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_destination_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route the flight is part of */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Date of departure */,
  "arrival_date" TEXT /* Date of arrival */,
  "flight_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the flight */,
  "departure_terminal" TEXT /* Terminal of departure */,
  "arrival_terminal" TEXT /* Terminal of arrival */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_data" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the passenger is part of */,
  "passenger_name" TEXT /* Name of the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "travel_class" TEXT /* Class of travel (economy, business, etc.) */,
  "passenger_age" INTEGER /* Age of the passenger */,
  "passenger_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger */,
  "frequent-flyer_number" TEXT /* Frequent-flyer number of the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_data_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticketing_data" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger the ticket is for */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was issued */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket expires */,
  "ticket_class" TEXT /* Class of service (e.g., economy, business, first) */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare of the ticket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticketing_data_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passenger_data ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft_data" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airline operating the aircraft */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of aircraft */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the aircraft */,
  "aircraft_age" INTEGER /* Age of the aircraft */,
  "seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the aircraft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_data_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_traffic_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger traffic trend entry */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport */,
  "rundate" TEXT /* Date the data was recorded */,
  "this_period" INTEGER /* Passenger traffic for the current period */,
  "last_period" INTEGER /* Passenger traffic for the previous period */,
  "total_pax_shd_tp" INTEGER /* Total passengers (sheduled) for the current period */,
  "total_pax_cht_tp" INTEGER /* Total passengers (charter) for the current period */,
  "total_pax_tp" INTEGER /* Total passengers for the current period */,
  "total_pax_lp" INTEGER /* Total passengers for the last period */,
  "total_pax_pc" REAL /* Percentage change in total passengers */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., seasonal, annual, monthly) */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_traffic_trends_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airport_performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport performance metric entry */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport */,
  "rundate" TEXT /* Date the data was recorded */,
  "passenger_satisfaction" REAL /* Passenger satisfaction score */,
  "airport_efficiency" REAL /* Airport efficiency score */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., passenger satisfaction, airport efficiency) */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_airport_performance_metrics_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, user, etc.) */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "user_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the user accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the user accessed the system */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., login, logout, access) */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
